# Saphin Praja — Data Analyst

> Portfolio of Saphin Praja, a junior data analyst with fintech experience working in SQL, Python, and Power BI.

## Pages

- [Home](/): About, experience at Xuno, projects (FX Insights Automation, Reddit Competitor & Remittance Monitor), skills, and contact.

## Guides

- [Building an AML Transaction Monitoring Script in Python & SQL](/guides/aml-transaction-monitoring): Practical walkthrough of a basic AML transaction monitoring script — rules, SQL window functions, Python loop, Slack alerts.
